untranslatable_reason: Cup with Handle requires multi-bar pattern recognition (cup formation with 30%+ rise, handle pullback formation, and specific geometric shape). This cannot be fully expressed with single-bar indicator crossovers. The pattern requires: (1) identifying point A (cup base), (2) validating rise to point B ≥30%, (3) detecting handle formation (secondary pullback), (4) confirming breakout above cup lip. Current indicators can detect the breakout (dc_upper) and price position (price_pos_20) but cannot validate the prior cup geometry or handle formation. Recommend: use a custom multi-bar pattern detector or add higher-level pattern recognition logic.
